title: 15 ORS Reports
body_text:
15	ORS Reports
15.1	Overview of ORS Reports
ORS provides real-time, online reports that summarize the current dayГўВЂВ™s returned items. Although these reports contain information similar to that found on the Summary pages, the following additional details are included:
The user who created the return or NOC transaction
The transaction input method (entered on ORS or uploaded to ORS)
The item count and dollar value totals of returned transactions by Transit Number
These daily reports can be requested until 11:00 pm PT (2:00 am ET). The reports are deleted from ORS after this time.
The following reports are available on ORS:
CAD Cheque (ORS Online Report ГўВЂВ“ Summary of Requested CAD Cheque Returns)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes Canadian dollar cheques returned the day the report is requested. The report also includes reinstated cheques.
USD Cheque (ORS Online Report ГўВЂВ“ Summary of Requested USD Cheque Returns)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes US dollar cheques returned the day the report is requested. The report also includes reinstated cheques.
CAD AFT (ORS Online Report ГўВЂВ“ Summary of Requested CAD AFT Returns)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes Canadian dollar AFT transactions returned the day the report is requested.
USD AFT (ORS Online Report ГўВЂВ“ Summary of Requested USD AFT Returns)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes US dollar AFT transactions returned the day the report is requested.
CAD NOC (NOC Online Report ГўВЂВ“ Summary of Requested CAD Notice of Change)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes the Canadian dollar AFT Notice of Change transactions created the day the report is requested.
USD NOC (NOC Online Report ГўВЂВ“ Summary of Requested USD Notice of Change)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes the US dollar AFT Notice of Change transactions created the day the report is requested.
Note:	ORS users only see the reports associated with their ORS usage type.
The following reports provide the final status of returned cheques, returned AFT transactions, and financial institution originated AFT Notice of Change (NOC) transactions. These reports are available in the MERG File which can be downloaded from Central 1ГўВЂВ™s File and Report Exchange. MERG files are located in your financial institutionГўВЂВ™s root directory. If applicable, PDFs of the ORPI and ORUI reports are available in the Clearing folder. Go to the ГўВЂВњCADГўВЂВќ subfolder to access Canadian dollar reports and the ГўВЂВњUSDГўВЂВќ subfolder for US dollar reports. PDFs of the ICBR, UCBR, ICTI, UCTI, NCOC, and NUOC are available in the AFT folder. Go to the ГўВЂВњCADГўВЂВќ subfolder to access Canadian dollar reports and the ГўВЂВњUSDГўВЂВќ subfolder for US dollar reports.
See the File Exchange and Report Distribution Part for more information on accessing the File and Report Exchange.
ORPI (CAD Online Return Processed Items
) ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes returned Canadian dollar cheques. The report also includes reinstated cheques.
ORUI (USD Online Return Processed Items)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes returned US dollar cheques. The report also includes reinstated cheques.
ICBR (CAD Batch Return User List)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes returned Canadian dollar AFT transactions including the reference number, amount, the return reason code, and whether the return is a credit or a debit. See the AFT Reports Part for a detailed description of this report.
UCBR (USD Batch Return User List)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes returned US dollar AFT transactions including the reference number, amount, the return reason code, and whether the return is for a credit or a debit. See the AFT Reports Part for a detailed description of this report.
ICTI (CAD Incoming AFT Transaction List)
ГўВЂВ“ Displays the details of individual return transactions initiated by your financial institution. The report confirms the Canadian dollar AFT returns processed by Central 1. The ICTI provides more detailed information than the ICBR and is available upon request. See the AFT Reports Part for a detailed description of this report.
UCTI (USD Incoming AFT Transaction List)
ГўВЂВ“ Displays the details of individual return transactions initiated by your financial institution. The report confirms the US dollar AFT returns processed by Central 1. The UCTI provides more detailed information than the UCBR and is available upon request. See the AFT Reports Part for a detailed description of this report.
NCOC (CAD NOC ГўВЂВ“ Originated by Financial Institution)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes Canadian dollar AFT Notice of Change transactions. See the AFT Reports Part for a detailed description of this report.
NUOC (USD NOC ГўВЂВ“ Originated by Financial Institution)
ГўВЂВ“ Summarizes US dollar AFT Notice of Change transactions. See the AFT Reports Part for a detailed description of this report.
15.2	Generating ORS Reports
Proceed as follows to generate ORS reports:
Log in to ORS and select the
Reports
link on the ORS menu bar. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Reports Option
Select the appropriate report link. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Reports Menu
Note:	Reports are organized by Transit Number. A subtotal by Transit Number and grand total for all Transit Numbers for item counts and dollar values (for cheque and AFT) are included in the reports.
View the reports. See Figure 3, Figure 4, and Figure 5.
Figure 3: Sample Report ГўВЂВ“ Cheques
Figure 4: Sample Report ГўВЂВ“ AFT
Figure 5: Sample Report ГўВЂВ“ NOC
Use the browser to print the report.
Note:	Although the page layout of the reports is landscape, most printers default to portrait. The portrait setting may not print all information. Use the landscape setting.
Related Information
Appendix #A-14
, ORS Cheque Report Fields
Appendix #A-15
, ORS AFT Report Fields
Appendix #A-16
, ORS AFT Notice of Change Report Fields
END
